pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-K-008 (Risk and Compliance) scores 0.427 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Observability Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Observability Engineer.
